feed.title: 虫合's Blog
feed.subtitle: 蒟蒻的博客
feed.rights: All rights reserved 2021, 虫合's Blog

entry.title: 【模板】广义后缀自动机（广义 SAM）
entry.content:
#include <algorithm>
#include <cstring>
#include <iomanip>
#include <iostream>
#include <numeric>
int n;
char s[1000001];
class GeneralSuffixAutomaton {
 public:
  struct Node {
    int len, link, nxt[26];
  } t_[2000001];
  int sz_, last_;
  GeneralSuffixAutomaton() { t_[0].link = -1; }
  void Expand(char);
  void Build(const char *);
  ~GeneralSuffixAutomaton() {}
} S;

void GeneralSuffixAutomaton::Expand(char c) {
  int p = last_;
  if (t_[p].nxt[c - 'a']) {
    int q = t_[p].nxt[c - 'a'];
    if (t_[q].len == t_[p].len + 1) {
      last_ = q;
    } else {
      int nq = ++sz_;
      t_[nq].len = t_[p].len + 1;
      t_[nq].link = t_[q].link;
      std::memcpy(t_[nq].nxt, t_[q].nxt, sizeof(t_[nq].nxt));
      while (p != -1 && t_[p].nxt[c - 'a'] == q) {
        t_[p].nxt[c - 'a'] = nq;
        p = t_[p].link;
      }
      t_[q].link = nq;
      last_ = nq;
    }
    return;
  }
  int cur = ++sz_;
  t_[cur].len = t_[p].len + 1;
  while (p != -1 && !t_[p].nxt[c - 'a']) {
    t_[p].nxt[c - 'a'] = cur;
    p = t_[p].link;
  }
  if (p == -1) {
    t_[cur].link = 0;
  } else {
    int q = t_[p].nxt[c - 'a'];
    if (t_[q].len == t_[p].len + 1) {
      t_[cur].link = q;
    } else {
      int nq = ++sz_;
      t_[nq].len = t_[p].len + 1;
      t_[nq].link = t_[q].link;
      std::memcpy(t_[nq].nxt, t_[q].nxt, sizeof(t_[q].nxt));
      while (p != -1 && t_[p].nxt[c - 'a'] == q) {
        t_[p].nxt[c - 'a'] = nq;
        p = t_[p].link;
      }
      t_[cur].link = t_[q].link = nq;
    }
  }
  last_ = cur;
}

void GeneralSuffixAutomaton::Build(const char *s) {
  last_ = 0;
  std::size_t n = std::strlen(s);
  for (std::size_t i = 0; i < n; i++) {
    Expand(s[i]);
  }
}
int main(int argc, char const *argv[]) {
  std::ios_base::sync_with_stdio(false);
  std::cin.tie(nullptr);
  std::cout.tie(nullptr);
  std::cin >> n;
  for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) {
    std::cin >> s;
    S.Build(s);
  }
  long long ans = 0LL;
  for (int i = 1; i <= S.sz_; i++) {
    ans += S.t_[i].len - S.t_[S.t_[i].link].len;
  }
  std::cout << ans;
  return 0;
}

entry.title: 【模板】李超树
entry.content:
#include <iostream>
#include <iomanip>
#include <algorithm>
#include <cstring>
#include <numeric>
constexpr int kMod = 39989, kMody = 1e9;
struct Segment
{
    int id;
    double k, b;
    Segment(int id = 0, double k = 0.0, double b = 0.0) : id(id), k(k), b(b) {}
} t[200001];
double F(Segment s, int x) { return s.k * x + s.b; }
int n;
void Modify(int L, int R, int l, int r, Segment v, int x)
{
    int mid = (l + r) >> 1;
    if (L <= l && r <= R)
    {
        if (F(t[x], mid) < F(v, mid) || !t[x].id)
        {
            std::swap(t[x], v);
        }
        double p = (v.b - t[x].b) / (t[x].k - v.k);
        if (l == r || t[x].k == v.k || p < l || p > r || !v.id)
        {
            return;
        }
        if (v.k < t[x].k)
        {
            Modify(L, R, l, mid, v, x + x);
        }
        else
        {
            Modify(L, R, mid + 1, r, v, x + x + 1);
        }
        return;
    }
    if (L <= mid)
    {
        Modify(L, R, l, mid, v, x + x);
    }
    if (R > mid)
    {
        Modify(L, R, mid + 1, r, v, x + x + 1);
    }
}
Segment Query(int l, int r, int p, int x)
{
    if (l == r)
    {
        return t[x];
    }
    int mid = (l + r) >> 1;
    Segment res;
    if (p <= mid)
    {
        res = Query(l, mid, p, x + x);
    }
    else
    {
        res = Query(mid + 1, r, p, x + x + 1);
    }
    return F(res, p) > F(t[x], p) ? res : t[x];
}
int main(int argc, char const *argv[])
{
    std::ios_base::sync_with_stdio(false);
    std::cin.tie(nullptr);
    std::cout.tie(nullptr);
    std::cin >> n;
    int lastans = 0, op, x0, x1, y0, y1, k, tot = 0;
    auto decode = [&lastans](int &x, const int &mod) -> void {
        x = (x + lastans - 1) % mod + 1;
    };
    for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++)
    {
        std::cin >> op;
        if (!op)
        {
            std::cin >> k;
            decode(k, kMod);
            std::cout << (lastans = Query(1, kMod, k, 1).id) << '\n';
        }
        else
        {
            std::cin >> x0 >> y0 >> x1 >> y1;
            decode(x0, kMod);
            decode(y0, kMody);
            decode(x1, kMod);
            decode(y1, kMody);
            Segment s;
            s.id = ++tot;
            if (x0 > x1)
            {
                std::swap(x0, x1);
                std::swap(y0, y1);
            }
            if (x0 == x1)
            {
                s.k = 0.0;
                s.b = std::max(y0, y1);
            }
            else
            {
                s.k = (y1 - y0) / static_cast<double>(x1 - x0);
                s.b = y0 - s.k * x0;
            }
            Modify(x0, x1, 1, kMod, s, 1);
        }
    }
    return 0;
}

entry.title: 【模板】动态 DP
entry.content:
线段树维护转移矩阵。

#include <iostream>
#include <iomanip>
#include <cstdio>
#include <algorithm>
#include <cstring>
#include <numeric>
struct Edge
{
    int to, nxt;
} e[200001];
int n, m, E, head[100001], a[100001], f[100001][2], fa[100001], sz[100001], son[100001], top[100001], bot[100001], dfn[100001], tot, id[100001];
void checkmax(int &x, int y)
{
    if (x < y)
    {
        x = y;
    }
}
void Add(int f, int t)
{
    e[E].to = t;
    e[E].nxt = head[f];
    head[f] = E++;
}
class Matrix
{
public:
    int a_[2][2];
    Matrix() { std::memset(a_, ~0x3f, sizeof(a_)); }
    Matrix operator*(const Matrix &) const;
    ~Matrix() {}
} t[400001], g[100001];

Matrix Matrix::operator*(const Matrix &b) const
{
    Matrix s;
    for (int i = 0; i < 2; i++)
    {
        for (int k = 0; k < 2; k++)
        {
            for (int j = 0; j < 2; j++)
            {
                checkmax(s.a_[i][j], a_[i][k] + b.a_[k][j]);
            }
        }
    }
    return s;
}
void Dfs(int u, int f)
{
    sz[u] = 1;
    fa[u] = f;
    for (int i = head[u]; i != -1; i = e[i].nxt)
    {
        int v = e[i].to;
        if (v == f)
        {
            continue;
        }
        Dfs(v, u);
        sz[u] += sz[v];
        if (sz[v] > sz[son[u]])
        {
            son[u] = v;
        }
    }
}
void Dfs2(int u, int t)
{
    id[dfn[u] = ++tot] = u;
    top[u] = t;
    checkmax(bot[t], tot);
    f[u][1] = g[u].a_[1][0] = a[u];
    g[u].a_[0][0] = g[u].a_[0][1] = 0;
    if (son[u])
    {
        Dfs2(son[u], t);
        f[u][0] += std::max(f[son[u]][0], f[son[u]][1]);
        f[u][1] += f[son[u]][0];
    }
    for (int i = head[u]; i != -1; i = e[i].nxt)
    {
        int v = e[i].to;
        if (v == fa[u] || v == son[u])
        {
            continue;
        }
        Dfs2(v, v);
        f[u][0] += std::max(f[v][0], f[v][1]);
        f[u][1] += f[v][0];
        g[u].a_[0][0] = g[u].a_[0][1] += std::max(f[v][0], f[v][1]);
        g[u].a_[1][0] += f[v][0];
    }
}
void Pushup(int x)
{
    t[x] = t[x + x] * t[x + x + 1];
}
void Build(int l, int r, int x)
{
    if (l == r)
    {
        t[x] = g[id[l]];
        return;
    }
    int mid = (l + r) >> 1;
    Build(l, mid, x + x);
    Build(mid + 1, r, x + x + 1);
    Pushup(x);
}
void Modify(int l, int r, int p, int x)
{
    if (l == r)
    {
        t[x] = g[id[p]];
        return;
    }
    int mid = (l + r) >> 1;
    if (p <= mid)
    {
        Modify(l, mid, p, x + x);
    }
    else
    {
        Modify(mid + 1, r, p, x + x + 1);
    }
    Pushup(x);
}
Matrix Query(int L, int R, int l, int r, int x)
{
    if (L <= l && r <= R)
    {
        return t[x];
    }
    int mid = (l + r) >> 1;
    if (L > mid)
    {
        return Query(L, R, mid + 1, r, x + x + 1);
    }
    else if (R <= mid)
    {
        return Query(L, R, l, mid, x + x);
    }
    else
    {
        return Query(L, R, l, mid, x + x) * Query(L, R, mid + 1, r, x + x + 1);
    }
}
int main(int argc, char const *argv[])
{
    std::ios_base::sync_with_stdio(false);
    std::cin.tie(nullptr);
    std::cout.tie(nullptr);
    std::memset(head, -1, sizeof(head));
    std::cin >> n >> m;
    for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++)
    {
        std::cin >> a[i];
    }
    for (int i = 1; i < n; i++)
    {
        int u, v;
        std::cin >> u >> v;
        Add(u, v);
        Add(v, u);
    }
    Dfs(1, 0);
    Dfs2(1, 1);
    Build(1, n, 1);
    for (int i = 1; i <= m; i++)
    {
        int x, y;
        std::cin >> x >> y;
        g[x].a_[1][0] += y - a[x];
        a[x] = y;
        Matrix pre, nxt, ans;
        while (x)
        {
            pre = Query(dfn[top[x]], bot[top[x]], 1, n, 1);
            Modify(1, n, dfn[x], 1);
            nxt = Query(dfn[top[x]], bot[top[x]], 1, n, 1);
            x = fa[top[x]];
            g[x].a_[0][0] = g[x].a_[0][1] += std::max(nxt.a_[0][0], nxt.a_[1][0]) - std::max(pre.a_[0][0], pre.a_[1][0]);
            g[x].a_[1][0] += nxt.a_[0][0] - pre.a_[0][0];
        }
        ans = Query(1, bot[1], 1, n, 1);
        std::cout << std::max(ans.a_[0][0], ans.a_[1][0]) << '\n';
    }
    return 0;
}

entry.title: 【模板】带修莫队
entry.summary: 加一维时间轴，复杂度 O(n53)O(n^{\frac{5}{3}})O(n35​)。
entry.content:
加一维时间轴，复杂度 O(n53)O(n^{\frac{5}{3}})O(n35​)。

#include <iostream>
#include <iomanip>
#include <cstdio>
#include <algorithm>
#include <cstring>
#include <cmath>
struct Query
{
    int l, r, t, id;
} q[133334];
struct Modify
{
    int x, pre, now;
} b[133334];
int n, m, B, a[133334], pos[133334], tot, ans[133334], cnt[1000001];
int main(int argc, char const *argv[])
{
    std::ios_base::sync_with_stdio(false);
    std::cin.tie(nullptr);
    std::cout.tie(nullptr);
    std::cin >> n >> m;
    B = std::pow(n, 2.0 / 3.0);
    for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++)
    {
        std::cin >> a[i];
        pos[i] = (i - 1) / B + 1;
    }
    char op[10];
    int t = 0;
    for (int i = 1; i <= m; i++)
    {
        std::cin >> op;
        if (op[0] == 'Q')
        {
            tot++;
            std::cin >> q[tot].l >> q[tot].r;
            q[tot].t = t;
            q[tot].id = tot;
        }
        else
        {
            t++;
            std::cin >> b[t].x >> b[t].now;
            b[t].pre = a[b[t].x];
            a[b[t].x] = b[t].now;
        }
    }
    for (int i = t; i >= 1; i--)
    {
        a[b[i].x] = b[i].pre;
    }
    t = 0;
    std::sort(q + 1, q + tot + 1, [](const Query &x, const Query &y) -> bool { return pos[x.l] == pos[y.l] ? pos[x.r] == pos[y.r] ? x.t < y.t : pos[x.r] < pos[y.r] : pos[x.l] < pos[y.l]; });
    int l = 1, r = 0, sum = 0;
    for (int i = 1; i <= tot; i++)
    {
        while (l > q[i].l)
        {
            sum += !cnt[a[--l]]++;
        }
        while (r < q[i].r)
        {
            sum += !cnt[a[++r]]++;
        }
        while (l < q[i].l)
        {
            sum -= !--cnt[a[l++]];
        }
        while (r > q[i].r)
        {
            sum -= !--cnt[a[r--]];
        }
        while (t < q[i].t)
        {
            t++;
            if (b[t].x >= l && b[t].x <= r)
            {
                sum -= !--cnt[a[b[t].x]];
                sum += !cnt[b[t].now]++;
            }
            a[b[t].x] = b[t].now;
        }
        while (t > q[i].t)
        {
            if (b[t].x >= l && b[t].x <= r)
            {
                sum -= !--cnt[a[b[t].x]];
                sum += !cnt[b[t].pre]++;
            }
            a[b[t].x] = b[t].pre;
            t--;
        }
        ans[q[i].id] = sum;
    }
    for (int i = 1; i <= tot; i++)
    {
        std::cout << ans[i] << '\n';
    }
    return 0;
}

entry.title: 【模板】树上莫队
entry.summary: 把树变成欧拉序（括号序）然后莫队。
entry.content:
把树变成欧拉序（括号序）然后莫队。

#include <iostream>
#include <iomanip>
#include <cstdio>
#include <algorithm>
#include <cstring>
#include <cmath>
struct Edge
{
    int to, nxt;
} e[80001];
struct Query
{
    int l, r, id, lca;
} q[100001];
int n, m, E, head[40001], a[40001], b[40001], dfn[80001], in[40001], out[40001], tot, dep[40001], fa[40001], top[40001], sz[40001], son[40001], vis[40001], B, pos[80001], cnt[40001], ans[100001], sum;
void Add(int f, int t)
{
    e[E].to = t;
    e[E].nxt = head[f];
    head[f] = E++;
}
void Dfs(int u, int f)
{
    dep[u] = dep[f] + 1;
    fa[u] = f;
    sz[u] = 1;
    dfn[in[u] = ++tot] = u;
    for (int i = head[u]; i != -1; i = e[i].nxt)
    {
        int v = e[i].to;
        if (v == f)
        {
            continue;
        }
        Dfs(v, u);
        sz[u] += sz[v];
        if (sz[v] > sz[son[u]])
        {
            son[u] = v;
        }
    }
    dfn[out[u] = ++tot] = u;
}
void Dfs2(int u, int t)
{
    top[u] = t;
    if (son[u])
    {
        Dfs2(son[u], t);
    }
    for (int i = head[u]; i != -1; i = e[i].nxt)
    {
        int v = e[i].to;
        if (v == fa[u] || v == son[u])
        {
            continue;
        }
        Dfs2(v, v);
    }
}
int GetLca(int u, int v)
{
    while (top[u] != top[v])
    {
        if (dep[top[u]] < dep[top[v]])
        {
            std::swap(u, v);
        }
        u = fa[top[u]];
    }
    return dep[u] < dep[v] ? u : v;
}
void Modify(int x)
{
    if (vis[x] ^= 1)
    {
        sum += !cnt[a[x]]++;
    }
    else
    {
        sum -= !--cnt[a[x]];
    }
}
int main(int argc, char const *argv[])
{
    std::ios_base::sync_with_stdio(false);
    std::cin.tie(nullptr);
    std::cout.tie(nullptr);
    std::memset(head, -1, sizeof(head));
    std::cin >> n >> m;
    for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++)
    {
        std::cin >> a[i];
    }
    std::memcpy(b + 1, a + 1, 4 * n);
    std::sort(b + 1, b + n + 1);
    int nn = std::unique(b + 1, b + n + 1) - b - 1;
    for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++)
    {
        a[i] = std::lower_bound(b + 1, b + nn + 1, a[i]) - b;
    }
    for (int i = 1; i < n; i++)
    {
        int u, v;
        std::cin >> u >> v;
        Add(u, v);
        Add(v, u);
    }
    Dfs(1, 0);
    Dfs2(1, 1);
    B = std::sqrt(n << 1);
    for (int i = 1; i <= 2 * n; i++)
    {
        pos[i] = (i - 1) / B + 1;
    }
    for (int i = 1; i <= m; i++)
    {
        int u, v, lca;
        std::cin >> u >> v;
        q[i].id = i;
        if (in[u] > in[v])
        {
            std::swap(u, v);
        }
        lca = GetLca(u, v);
        if (u == lca)
        {
            q[i].l = in[u];
            q[i].r = in[v];
        }
        else
        {
            q[i].l = out[u];
            q[i].r = in[v];
            q[i].lca = lca;
        }
    }
    std::sort(q + 1, q + m + 1, [](const Query &x, const Query &y) -> bool { return pos[x.l] == pos[y.l] ? x.r < y.r : pos[x.l] < pos[y.l]; });
    int l = 1, r = 0;
    for (int i = 1; i <= m; i++)
    {
        while (l > q[i].l)
        {
            Modify(dfn[--l]);
        }
        while (r < q[i].r)
        {
            Modify(dfn[++r]);
        }
        while (l < q[i].l)
        {
            Modify(dfn[l++]);
        }
        while (r > q[i].r)
        {
            Modify(dfn[r--]);
        }
        if (q[i].lca)
        {
            Modify(q[i].lca);
        }
        ans[q[i].id] = sum;
        if (q[i].lca)
        {
            Modify(q[i].lca);
        }
    }
    for (int i = 1; i <= m; i++)
    {
        std::cout << ans[i] << '\n';
    }
    return 0;
}

entry.title: 【模板】线段树分治
entry.content:
#include <iostream>
#include <iomanip>
#include <cstdio>
#include <algorithm>
#include <cstring>
#include <vector>
#include <numeric>
struct Edge
{
    int u, v;
} e[200001];
int n, m, k;
std::vector<int> v[400001];
class DisjointSet
{
private:
    int fa_[200001], s_[200001], top_, sz_[200001];

public:
    DisjointSet() {}
    void Init();
    int Find(int);
    void Merge(int, int);
    void Undo();
    ~DisjointSet() {}
    friend void Dfs(int, int, int);
} T;

void DisjointSet::Init()
{
    std::iota(fa_ + 1, fa_ + 2 * n + 1, 1);
    std::fill(sz_ + 1, sz_ + 2 * n + 1, 1);
}

int DisjointSet::Find(int x)
{
    while (x != fa_[x])
    {
        x = fa_[x];
    }
    return x;
}

void DisjointSet::Merge(int x, int y)
{
    x = Find(x);
    y = Find(y);
    if (x == y)
    {
        return;
    }
    if (sz_[x] > sz_[y])
    {
        std::swap(x, y);
    }
    s_[++top_] = x;
    sz_[y] += sz_[x];
    fa_[x] = y;
}

void DisjointSet::Undo()
{
    int x = s_[top_--];
    sz_[fa_[x]] -= sz_[x];
    fa_[x] = x;
}
void Insert(int L, int R, int l, int r, int val, int x)
{
    if (L <= l && r <= R)
    {
        v[x].emplace_back(val);
        return;
    }
    int mid = (l + r) >> 1;
    if (L <= mid)
    {
        Insert(L, R, l, mid, val, x + x);
    }
    if (R > mid)
    {
        Insert(L, R, mid + 1, r, val, x + x + 1);
    }
}
void Dfs(int l, int r, int x)
{
    bool f = true;
    int top = T.top_;
    for (auto &&i : v[x])
    {
        int fu = T.Find(e[i].u), fv = T.Find(e[i].v);
        if (fu == fv)
        {
            for (int j = l; j <= r; j++)
            {
                std::cout << "No\n";
            }
            f = false;
            break;
        }
        T.Merge(fu, T.Find(e[i].v + n));
        T.Merge(fv, T.Find(e[i].u + n));
    }
    if (f)
    {
        if (l == r)
        {
            std::cout << "Yes\n";
        }
        else
        {
            int mid = (l + r) >> 1;
            Dfs(l, mid, x + x);
            Dfs(mid + 1, r, x + x + 1);
        }
    }
    while (T.top_ > top)
    {
        T.Undo();
    }
}
int main(int argc, char const *argv[])
{
    std::ios_base::sync_with_stdio(false);
    std::cin.tie(nullptr);
    std::cout.tie(nullptr);
    std::cin >> n >> m >> k;
    int l, r;
    for (int i = 1; i <= m; i++)
    {
        std::cin >> e[i].u >> e[i].v >> l >> r;
        if (l == r)
        {
            continue;
        }
        Insert(l + 1, r, 1, k, i, 1);
    }
    T.Init();
    Dfs(1, k, 1);
    return 0;
}

entry.title: 【模板】莫队二次离线
entry.summary: 将贡献差分，打标记，要手推式子。
entry.content:
将贡献差分，打标记，要手推式子。

#include <iostream>
#include <iomanip>
#include <cstdio>
#include <algorithm>
#include <cstring>
#include <vector>
#include <cmath>
#include <numeric>
struct Query
{
    int l, r, id;
    long long ans;
} q[100001];
struct Node
{
    int l, r, id, op;
    Node(int l = 0, int r = 0, int id = 0, int op = 0) : l(l), r(r), id(id), op(op) {}
};
int n, m, B, tot, k, a[100001], pos[100001], pre[100001], cnt[16384];
std::vector<int> v;
std::vector<Node> b[100001];
int main(int argc, char const *argv[])
{
    std::ios_base::sync_with_stdio(false);
    std::cin.tie(nullptr);
    std::cout.tie(nullptr);
    std::cin >> n >> m >> k;
    if (k > 14)
    {
        for (int i = 1; i <= m; i++)
        {
            std::cout << "0\n";
        }
        return 0;
    }
    B = std::sqrt(n);
    tot = (n - 1) / B + 1;
    for (int i = 0; i < 16384; i++)
    {
        if (__builtin_popcount(i) == k)
        {
            v.emplace_back(i);
        }
    }
    for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++)
    {
        std::cin >> a[i];
        pos[i] = (i - 1) / B + 1;
    }
    for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++)
    {
        pre[i] = cnt[a[i]];
        for (auto &&j : v)
        {
            cnt[j ^ a[i]]++;
        }
    }
    for (int i = 1; i <= m; i++)
    {
        std::cin >> q[i].l >> q[i].r;
        q[i].id = i;
    }
    std::sort(q + 1, q + m + 1, [](const Query &x, const Query &y) -> bool { return pos[x.l] == pos[y.l] ? x.r < y.r : pos[x.l] < pos[y.l]; });
    int l = 1, r = 0;
    for (int i = 1; i <= m; i++)
    {
        if (l > q[i].l)
        {
            b[r].emplace_back(q[i].l, l - 1, i, 1);
        }
        while (l > q[i].l)
        {
            q[i].ans -= pre[--l];
        }
        if (r < q[i].r)
        {
            b[l - 1].emplace_back(r + 1, q[i].r, i, -1);
        }
        while (r < q[i].r)
        {
            q[i].ans += pre[++r];
        }
        if (l < q[i].l)
        {
            b[r].emplace_back(l, q[i].l - 1, i, -1);
        }
        while (l < q[i].l)
        {
            q[i].ans += pre[l++];
        }
        if (r > q[i].r)
        {
            b[l - 1].emplace_back(q[i].r + 1, r, i, 1);
        }
        while (r > q[i].r)
        {
            q[i].ans -= pre[r--];
        }
    }
    std::memset(cnt, 0, sizeof(cnt));
    for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++)
    {
        for (auto &&j : v)
        {
            cnt[a[i] ^ j]++;
        }
        for (auto &&j : b[i])
        {
            for (int o = j.l; o <= j.r; o++)
            {
                if (o < i && !k)
                {
                    q[j.id].ans += j.op * (cnt[a[o]] - 1);
                }
                else
                {
                    q[j.id].ans += j.op * cnt[a[o]];
                }
            }
        }
    }
    for (int i = 1; i <= m; i++)
    {
        q[i].ans += q[i - 1].ans;
    }
    std::sort(q + 1, q + m + 1, [](const Query &x, const Query &y) -> bool { return x.id < y.id; });
    for (int i = 1; i <= m; i++)
    {
        std::cout << q[i].ans << '\n';
    }
    return 0;
}

entry.title: 【模板】回滚莫队
entry.content:
#include <iostream>
#include <iomanip>
#include <cstdio>
#include <algorithm>
#include <cstring>
#include <cmath>
struct Query
{
    int l, r, id;
} q[200001];
int n, m, B, tot, a[200001], b[200001], pos[200001], L[501], R[501], fst[200001], lst[200001], c[200001], cnt, ans[200001];
template <typename T>
void Read(T &x)
{
    x = 0;
    char c = getchar();
    while (c < '0' || c > '9')
    {
        c = getchar();
    }
    x = c - '0';
    while ((c = getchar()) >= '0' && c <= '9')
    {
        x = x * 10 + c - '0';
    }
}
template <typename T, typename... Args>
void Read(T &x, Args &...args)
{
    Read(x);
    Read(args...);
}
void checkmax(int &x, int y)
{
    if (x < y)
    {
        x = y;
    }
}
int Calc(int l, int r)
{
    int ans = 0;
    for (int i = l; i <= r; i++)
    {
        if (!fst[a[i]])
        {
            fst[a[i]] = i;
        }
        else
        {
            checkmax(ans, i - fst[a[i]]);
        }
    }
    for (int i = l; i <= r; i++)
    {
        fst[a[i]] = 0;
    }
    return ans;
}
int main(int argc, char const *argv[])
{
    Read(n);
    B = std::sqrt(n);
    tot = (n - 1) / B + 1;
    for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++)
    {
        Read(a[i]);
        pos[i] = (i - 1) / B + 1;
    }
    for (int i = 1; i < tot; i++)
    {
        L[i] = (i - 1) * B + 1;
        R[i] = i * B;
    }
    L[tot] = (tot - 1) * B + 1;
    R[tot] = n;
    std::memcpy(b + 1, a + 1, 4 * n);
    std::sort(b + 1, b + n + 1);
    int nn = std::unique(b + 1, b + n + 1) - b - 1;
    for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++)
    {
        a[i] = std::lower_bound(b + 1, b + nn + 1, a[i]) - b;
    }
    Read(m);
    for (int i = 1; i <= m; i++)
    {
        Read(q[i].l, q[i].r);
        q[i].id = i;
    }
    std::sort(q + 1, q + m + 1, [](const Query &x, const Query &y) -> bool { return pos[x.l] == pos[y.l] ? x.r < y.r : pos[x.l] < pos[y.l]; });
    int p = 1;
    for (int i = 1; i <= tot; i++)
    {
        int l = R[i] + 1, r = R[i], max = 0;
        cnt = 0;
        while (p <= m && pos[q[p].l] == i)
        {
            if (pos[q[p].r] == i)
            {
                ans[q[p].id] = Calc(q[p].l, q[p].r);
            }
            else
            {
                while (r < q[p].r)
                {
                    r++;
                    lst[a[r]] = r;
                    if (!fst[a[r]])
                    {
                        fst[a[r]] = r;
                        c[++cnt] = a[r];
                    }
                    checkmax(max, r - fst[a[r]]);
                }
                int tmp = max;
                while (l > q[p].l)
                {
                    l--;
                    if (!lst[a[l]])
                    {
                        lst[a[l]] = l;
                    }
                    else
                    {
                        checkmax(max, lst[a[l]] - l);
                    }
                }
                ans[q[p].id] = max;
                while (l <= R[i])
                {
                    if (lst[a[l]] == l)
                    {
                        lst[a[l]] = 0;
                    }
                    l++;
                }
                max = tmp;
            }
            p++;
        }
        for (int i = 1; i <= cnt; i++)
        {
            fst[c[i]] = lst[c[i]] = 0;
        }
    }
    for (int i = 1; i <= m; i++)
    {
        std::cout << ans[i] << '\n';
    }
    return 0;
}

entry.title: 【学习笔记】Burnside 引理
entry.summary:
Burnside 引理学习笔记

前言

略去所有的定义及证明，只考虑如何用来解题。
entry.content:
Burnside 引理学习笔记

前言

略去所有的定义及证明，只考虑如何用来解题。

正题

设 GGG 是一个作用在集合 XXX 上的有限群。对 g∈Gg \in Gg∈G，设 XgX^gXg 表示 XXX 中在 ggg 作用下的不动元素（也称轨道数），则表示 GGG 作用在 XXX 上产生的所有等价类的集合 X/GX/GX/G 满足:

∣X/G∣=1∣G∣∑g∈G∣Xg∣|X/G|=\dfrac{1}{|G|}\sum\limits_{g \in G}|X^g| ∣X/G∣=∣G∣1​g∈G∑​∣Xg∣

例：

给长度为 nnn 的环用 mmm 种颜色染色，求本质不同方案数。

将旋转操作作为置换群中的元素，求出每一种置换对应的不动点数为 gcd⁡(n,i)\gcd(n,i)gcd(n,i)。
故答案为 1n∑i=1nmgcd⁡(n,i)\dfrac{1}{n}\sum_{i=1}^nm^{\gcd(n,i)}n1​∑i=1n​mgcd(n,i)。

重要的一点： 一个轨道内所有的元素是一样的。

奥妙重重的立体置换群

给一个立方体染色方案数。

三维空间的旋转有多种，面的中心、棱的中心、顶点的中心连线都可以做对称轴。
转的角度可以考虑平面展开图。

旋转 角度 数量 面 棱 点
不转 0°0\degree0° 111 (1)6(1)^6(1)6 (1)12(1)^{12}(1)12 (1)8(1)^8(1)8
面面 90°90\degree90° 333 (1)2(4)1(1)^2(4)^1(1)2(4)1 (4)3(4)^3(4)3 (4)2(4)^2(4)2
面面 180°180\degree180° 333 (1)2(2)2(1)^2(2)^2(1)2(2)2 (2)6(2)^6(2)6 (2)4(2)^4(2)4
面面 270°270\degree270° 333 (1)2(4)1(1)^2(4)^1(1)2(4)1 (4)3(4)^3(4)3 (4)2(4)^2(4)2
棱棱 180°180\degree180° 666 (2)3(2)^3(2)3 (1)2(2)5(1)^2(2)^5(1)2(2)5 (2)4(2)^4(2)4
点点 120°120\degree120° 444 (3)2(3)^2(3)2 (3)4(3)^4(3)4 (1)2(3)2(1)^2(3)^2(1)2(3)2
点点 240°240\degree240° 444 (3)2(3)^2(3)2 (3)4(3)^4(3)4 (1)2(3)2(1)^2(3)^2(1)2(3)2

立体图形外角和：点数 ×(180°−∑内角和)=720°\times(180\degree-\sum\text{内角和})=720\degree×(180°−∑内角和)=720°。

entry.title: 【模板】最小圆覆盖
entry.content:
Circle SmallestCircle(const std::vector<Point> &b)
{
    std::vector<Point> a(b);
    std::srand(std::chrono::_V2::steady_clock::now().time_since_epoch().count());
    std::random_shuffle(a.begin(), a.end());
    Circle O(a.front());
    for (size_t i = 1; i < a.size(); i++)
    {
        if (!O.InCircle(a.at(i)))
        {
            O = Circle(a.at(i));
            for (size_t j = 0; j < i; j++)
            {
                if (!O.InCircle(a.at(j)))
                {
                    O = Circle(a.at(i), a.at(j));
                    for (size_t k = 0; k < j; k++)
                    {
                        if (!O.InCircle(a.at(k)))
                        {
                            O = Circle(a.at(i), a.at(j), a.at(k));
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
    return O;
}
